description_long: This object depicts a small urban neighborhood block featuring several modern houses arranged along a central road. The houses are characterized by flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of white, gray, and black facades, with some green landscaping and driveways visible. Each house appears to have a unique layout, with some including attached garages, patios, and swimming pools. The road bisects the block, providing access to each property, and sidewalks or pathways connect the homes. The architectural style is distinctly modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The overall scene suggests a planned residential area with a focus on contemporary design and outdoor amenities.
description: A modern residential block with several flat-roofed houses, large windows, and a central road, featuring driveways, patios, and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facades of the houses, the central road, and visible driveways and patios.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the houses, backyards, pools, and the road running through the center.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back sides of the houses, garages, and additional outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arrangement of houses, pools, and the central road from the other direction.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryways with flat doors, some with small porches or steps, and occasional overhangs or canopies.
